nodes.text: Date of birth? Uh — January eighth, eighty-nine. I always forget if I'm supposed to say the year or just the date.

responses.text: Just the date is fine. That matches.
Can you give me the full year?

nodes.text: Nineteen eighty-nine. January eighth. I share a birthday with Elvis, supposedly. Someone told me that once at a bar and I still don't know if it's true.
Cool. Is that it or do you need anything else? No pressure, I'm just — I've been on my feet since six this morning.

responses.text: That's everything. Go get your drink.
